mnemonics: PEMDAS, Parentheses, Exponents, Multiplication, Division, Addition, Subtraction
keyPoints: Relational Operators compare values and return true or false
Boolean Logical Operators are used to combine true/false values
Assignment Operators assign values to variables
The ? Operator is used for conditional statements
Operator Precedence determines the order of operations
Understanding Operator Precedence is crucial for correct code
